✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

Audio playback: A serious multi-format playback/decoding engine (FLAC, Ogg, MP3, DSD…). v1 extraction is Swift-only and this package is ObjC-first — verdicts wait for the ObjC extractor; manifest floors: macOS 11 / iOS 15 / tvOS 15.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of SFBAudioEngine? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want — open an issue on GitHub or see contribute.
